textPlain: I think the webcast will be hosted here: https://www.blueorigin.com/missions/ng-2
I did not get the part with the coverage. Are we getting something similar to the ones the SpaceX is spoiling us every time or just some ground based camera pointed to the sky?

> Blue Origin officials said they were talking with the F.A.A. to see if they could obtain an exception if Sunday’s launch attempt were to be called off.“Are there any budgets we can donate to? What’s the FAA’s Venmo?”
